src: A Meowth pokemon toy sitting and waving hands, in hyper-realistic anime-inspired style. It has oversized embroidered eyes and sharply defined lines around its face and limbs.
edit: A Meowth pokemon toy sitting and waving hands in vibrant graffiti style. It has oversized eyes with colorful strokes, sharply defined lines, and a body with splashes of bright, contrasting colors, reflecting urban murals.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The Pokemon is on a dark wooden table in the room corner, viewed slightly from above, with plain white walls.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The Pokémon is viewed slightly from above, placed on a white metal lattice in a room corner with plain white walls.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: A Pokemon is lying on a black background.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The Pokémon is viewed slightly from below, sitting on a metal stick, with one leg hanging down and one partially hidden, against a plain white background.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The Pokémon is in graffiti style, viewed from above, on a chaotic graffiti-covered wooden table in a corner room. The white walls have colorful spray paint designs and street art motifs, creating an urban playground vibe.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: A street-art-inspired Pokémon viewed slightly from above, vibrant against graffiti-laced metal lattice. Positioned in a corner, plain white walls are an urban canvas with spray-paint patterns, chaotic tags, and abstract shapes in bright hues.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: A vibrant Pokemon sprawled against a black canvas, in graffiti art style. Its body has bold, electric hues, surrounded by dynamic lines, abstract shapes, multicolored spray effects, and neon highlights, creating depth and movement.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: A vibrant pokemon viewed from below, perched on a metal stick. One leg hangs while the other is hidden, forming an edgy silhouette. It features graffiti-style bold lines and colors, against a blank background highlighting an urban-inspired aesthetic.
